title: LEGO ONE PIECE The Baratie Floating Restaurant Building Set for Adults - Display Model with Detailed Interior plus 10 Minifigures incl. Luffy, Nami & Sanji - Anime Gift for Fans - 75640
features: ONE PIECE model kit for adults – This detailed LEGO recreation of the iconic ONE PIECE location is a fun building set for manga lovers, pirate fans and men and women who love model building
10 LEGO ONE PIECE minifigures – Classic scenes can be reproduced with minifigures of Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Zeff, Garp, Helmeppo, Koby and Mihawk
Detailed, accessible interior – The ship-shaped design of this DIY building set contains many rooms within its interiors, including kitchen and dining areas, Zeff’s quarters and the treasure room
Authentic accessories – The model kit comes with 5 'Wanted' posters, plus lots of food and drink accessories, an iconic transponder snail (snail telephone) and Mihawk's distinctive boat
LEGO ONE PIECE anime gift – This build-and-display set makes a fun home or office decor piece and a great gift for men and women who are fans of the live-action ONE PIECE Netflix show
High-quality instructions – A coffee-table-style guide provides step-by-step building instructions, design details and more, and the LEGO Builder app includes a digital version of the same guide
Building sets for adults – This buildable model is part of the LEGO Sets for Adults range, (sets sold separately) designed to deliver a rewarding and immersive escape for any model-making enthusiast
description: From the manufacturer Iconic model for adult ONE PIECE enthusiasts This impressive re-creation of the iconic scene of many ONE PIECE adventures is designed with adult fans in mind. Detailed interior with rooms and minifigures This authentic build-and-display set brings ONE PIECE adventures to life with 10 characters from the Netflix show. LEGO ONE PIECE The Baratie Floating Restaurant Detailed, accessible rooms Includes a kitchen, Zeff’s quarters and a treasure room. 10 ONE PIECE characters LEGO minifigures include Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp and Sanji. ‘Wanted’ posters Display 5 of 8 collectible ‘Wanted’ posters. Immersive building experience The 3,402-piece Baratie Restaurant is filled with authentic details and familiar characters from the popular Netflix show. More ONE PIECE action to explore There are more pirate adventures to discover with the full range of LEGO ONE PIECE sets (sold separately).
